title: from_uri: local-signing missing explicit signing-only arm
description: from_uri() in secretx/src/lib.rs has explicit rejection arms for aws-kms and wolfhsm (both signing-only backends) that return a helpful 'signing-only backend; use from_signing_uri' error. The local-signing backend is also signing-only but has no arm — when local-signing feature is enabled, from_uri('secretx://local-signing/...') falls through to the catch-all 'unknown or disabled backend' message, which is misleading because the feature IS enabled. Also missing the corresponding test (from_uri_local_signing_signing_only_returns_invalid_uri) that exists for aws-kms and wolfhsm.
